ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the study focuses on */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date the study was conducted */,
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator (PI) of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the study data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_id") REFERENCES pi ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pi" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PI */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Name of the PI */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the PI */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the PI is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the PI */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the PI is affiliated with */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the PI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the result belongs to */,
  "term" TEXT /* Biological term or pathway associated with the result */,
  "overlap" TEXT /* Overlap of genes in the term */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the result */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value of the result */,
  "old_p_value" REAL /* Old p-value of the result */,
  "old_adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Old adjusted p-value of the result */,
  "odds_ratio" REAL /* Odds ratio of the result */,
  "combined_score" REAL /* Combined score of the result */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the results */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the results */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene */,
  "gene_ontology_id" TEXT /* Gene Ontology (GO) ID */,
  "external_database_id" TEXT /* ID from external databases */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the gene data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the gene data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_genes" (
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression result */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene involved in the result */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "fold_change" REAL /* Fold change in gene expression */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the gene expression change */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for the gene expression change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the gene expression data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_expression_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "pathway_type" TEXT /* Type of pathway */,
  "external_database_id" TEXT /* ID from external databases */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the pathway data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the pathway data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_genes" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene involved in the pathway */,
  "role_in_pathway" TEXT /* Role of the gene in the pathway */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the pathway-gene relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the pathway-gene relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last password change date */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user is affiliated with */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
